sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39883" key="e)pikrhthri/dios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπικρητηρίδιος</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἠθμός</foreign> strainer <sense id="n39883.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for a mixing bowl</tr_>, Demioprat. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:108" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.108</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
